_meta.description: English intent patterns for DOCX editing operations.

positive: Add more detail to the introduction

clarifyIfMissing.ask_en: What should I replace it with?

positive: Apply replace span to the selected paragraph.

clarifyIfMissing.ask_en: What should I replace it with?

clarifyIfMissing.ask_pt: Qual texto devo procurar (sensivel a maiusculas)?

clarifyIfMissing.ask_en: What should I replace it with?

positive: Case sensitive find and replace "Name" with "FullName"
Find and replace "API" with "Interface" case sensitive
Apply find_replace case_sensitive to the selected paragraph.

clarifyIfMissing.ask_en: What language should I translate to?

positive: Translate the selected text into French

clarifyIfMissing.ask_en: What language should I translate the document to?
clarifyIfMissing.ask_pt: Para qual idioma devo traduzir o documento?

positive: Translate the entire document to Spanish
Translate the whole file into French

clarifyIfMissing.ask_en: What color should I apply to the text?
clarifyIfMissing.ask_pt: Qual cor devo aplicar ao texto?

positive: Change the text color to red
Use Times New Roman for this paragraph

clarifyIfMissing.ask_en: What font size should I set (in points)?
clarifyIfMissing.ask_pt: Qual tamanho de fonte devo definir (em pontos)?

positive: Set the text size to 12 points
Align the text to the left
Apply align left to the selected paragraph.
Align the text to the right
Apply align right to the selected paragraph.
Turn the bullet list into regular paragraphs
Turn the text into a bulleted list
Apply list paragraph_to_bullets to the selected paragraph.
Turn bullet list into plain text
Apply list bullets_to_paragraph to the selected paragraph.
Switch from numbered to bulleted list
Apply list numbered_to_bullets to the selected paragraph.
Turn bullet points into numbered steps
Apply list bullets_to_numbered to the selected paragraph.
Change from heading to normal text
Apply Heading 1 to all section titles

clarifyIfMissing.ask_en: Which heading level should I set?
clarifyIfMissing.ask_pt: Qual nível de título devo definir?

positive: Insert a paragraph after this one
Insert new paragraph after the introduction
Add a blank paragraph beneath this
Insert a paragraph before this one
Insert new paragraph before the conclusion
Add a blank paragraph above this
Apply section remove to the selected paragraph.
Split the paragraph at the cursor
Change paragraph style to No Spacing

clarifyIfMissing.ask_en: Which document(s) should I use as a source?
clarifyIfMissing.ask_pt: Qual(is) documento(s) devo usar como fonte?

positive: Use document X to improve this paragraph
Incorporate data from the source file
Improve this section using the reference document
Apply format remove_bold to the selected paragraph.
Apply format remove_italic to the selected paragraph.
Apply format remove_underline to the selected paragraph.

regex_any: \b(?:rewrite|rephrase|reword)\b.*\b(?:so that|such that|to make it|to sound|making it)\b

positive: Rewrite this paragraph so that it sounds more persuasive
Rephrase to make it more suitable for a legal audience
Reword the text to sound more optimistic
Change this paragraph to make it more action-oriented
Apply rewrite friendly to the selected paragraph.
Apply title case to the heading
Apply case sentence to the selected paragraph.
Break down into key points as bullets
negative: Summarize this section into one paragraph

positive: Apply toc update to the selected paragraph.
Insert a page break before this paragraph
Put a page break after the introduction
Apply page_break to the selected paragraph.
Insert next-page section break before chapter 3
Apply section_break to the selected paragraph.
